title: telle me more about fenix vs apple watch

messages.content: telle me more about fenix vs apple watch

I don't have any information for the Garmin Fenix in my documents, so I can't directly compare Fenix models to the Apple Watch — I can only describe what the Apple Watch Series 11 offers relative to your priorities.

For your goals (stress monitoring, long battery, with-display, GPS accuracy, sleep monitoring), Series 11 highlights from the review: it has a larger battery (about +9% on 42mm, +11% on 46mm), roughly 24 hours of typical runtime and up to 38 hours in Low Power Mode, often stretching to a day-and-a-half in real use, plus fast charging. It supports sleep tracking (the reviewer wore it through sleep and still had plenty of charge afterward), has returned blood-oxygen monitoring in the US, runs watchOS 26 responsively, and of course includes a full Apple Watch display and good call microphones. 

I don't have details here about stress-monitoring specifics or measured GPS-accuracy numbers for the Series 11, nor any specs for Garmin Fenix units to compare those points. If you tell me which Fenix model you mean (or paste its specs), I can make a direct comparison focused on battery, GPS accuracy, sleep, and stress features.
